title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature and Goal-buddy capabilities in what he characterizes as the arrival of true autonomous coders. The video covers how the /goal feature works, its setup, prompting practices, and Mission exploration for long horizontal tasks.
